projectName: Shift product-oriented selling to solution selling
initialSituation: Product-centric sales approach with limited value articulation and low differentiation
keyChallenge: Difficulty communicating business value, Low win rates in complex deals, Misalignment with enterprise buying process
strategy: Transition to value-based, solution-oriented selling model
solution: Develop industry-specific solution packages and value frameworks
data-AI-Approach: Value quantification models based on customer operational data
impactSummary: Drove 280% revenue growth ($86M) by transforming product-centric sales into a value-based solution selling model.

initialSituation: Go-to-market execution relied heavily on fragmented, experience-driven decision-making with limited data visibility. Targeting, partner engagement, and opportunity prioritization were inconsistent, resulting in inefficient resource allocation and suboptimal market coverage.
keyChallenge: Lack of a structured and scalable GTM framework integrating market segmentation, partner strategy, and pipeline prioritization. Difficulty in identifying high-value accounts, aligning partner contributions, and improving conversion efficiency in complex enterprise sales cycles.
strategy: Design and implement a structured, data-driven go-to-market framework combining market segmentation, account prioritization, and partner ecosystem orchestration to systematically improve targeting accuracy and execution efficiency.
solution: Developed an integrated go-to-market engine including customer segmentation models, partner performance management system, and opportunity scoring mechanisms. Enabled coordinated execution across sales, marketing, and partners through standardized processes and data-driven insights.
dataAIApproach: Leveraged multi-dimensional data including industry, account size, historical deal data, and partner performance to build segmentation and scoring models. Applied analytics-driven prioritization and predictive insights to guide account targeting, partner alignment, and pipeline management decisions.
systemImplemented: Structured go-to-market engine with segmentation, targeting, and partner orchestration
modelsBuilt: Market segmentation model, partner scoring model, opportunity prioritization model
impactSummary: Delivered 260% revenue growth by building a structured, data-driven go-to-market engine integrating segmentation, partner strategy, and opportunity prioritization.

projectName: Data-driven marketing lead scoring and assessment
initialSituation: Low lead quality and poor conversion rates
keyChallenge: High volume, low-quality leads, Weak alignment between marketing and sales
strategy: Implement lead scoring and qualification model
data-AI-Approach: Predictive lead scoring using behavioral and firmographic data
impactSummary: Improved pipeline quality and conversion efficiency using predictive lead scoring.

projectName: Data-driven sales pipeline scoring and assessment
initialSituation: Poor pipeline visibility and unreliable forecasts
keyChallenge: Inaccurate pipeline forecasting, Inefficient opportunity prioritization
solution: Opportunity scoring and pipeline health dashboard
impactSummary: Improved forecast accuracy by 35% through pipeline scoring analytics.

initialSituation: Traditional project-based revenue model with limited scalability
keyChallenge: High customer resistance to upfront investment, Limited recurring revenue
data-AI-Approach: Energy baseline and process modeling and savings tracking
impactSummary: Generated $138M revenue and enabled 3M tons CO2 reduction.

initialSituation: Limited ecosystem partnerships restricting market expansion
keyChallenge: Weak partner engagement, Limited access to large enterprise projects
strategy: Build strategic alliances with industrial partners
data-AI-Approach: Partner performance tracking and opportunity mapping
impactSummary: Expanded market reach through strategic partner ecosystem.

initialSituation: High energy consumption and inefficient power usage
keyChallenge: Rising energy costs, Lack of optimization tools and ajustment manners
strategy: Implement data-driven energy and process optimization
impactSummary: Delivered $175M annual cost savings and 3M tons CO2 reduction.

initialSituation: Inefficient boiler operations and high fuel consumption
strategy: Optimize boiler performance using data models
impactSummary: Improved boiler efficiency and reduced emissions via AI optimization.

initialSituation: Inefficient procurement decisions and price volatility exposure
keyChallenge: tens of crude oil specification to select, Lack of optimization in sourcing, High procurement costs
strategy: Optimize procurement using analytics combining production characteristics and product market price dynamics
impactSummary: Increased profitability by $220M annually through procurement optimization.

initialSituation: Frequent equipment failures and high maintenance costs
impactSummary: Reduced downtime by 33% using predictive maintenance.

initialSituation: High sensitivity of production systems and risk of failure
keyChallenge: Production loss risks, High maintenance cost
impactSummary: Reduced production risk and downtime using predictive analytics.

projectName: Shift to strategic partnering commercial model

keyChallenge: Low customer lifetime value, Weak strategic positioning
impactSummary: Scaled revenue to $900M+ through strategic partnership model.
